mapper.select: SELECT id, main_id, expense_id, amount, balance_before, balance_after, item_name, notes FROM pr_transaction_record_sub WHERE main_id = #{mainId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_transaction_record SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId} AND status = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(transaction_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m')
UPDATE pr_transaction_record SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.house_id) AS arrearsHouseCount, COUNT(*) AS arrearsCount, SUM(e.receivable - e.paid_in) AS totalArrears FROM pr_expense e WHERE e.company_id = #{companyId} AND e.org_id = #{orgId} AND e.is_charged = 0 AND e.receivable > 0

SELECT r.id, r.serial_num, r.transaction_type, r.payment_type, r.amount, r.paid_amount, r.status, r.transaction_time, r.operator_id, r.notes, r.invoice_no, b.room_num, u.user_name FROM pr_transaction_record r LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON r.house_id = b.id LEFT JOIN pr_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.org_id = #{orgId} AND DATE(r.transaction_time) = #{date} AND status = 0 ORDER BY r.transaction_time ASC
